Aura Minerals Inc. concludes bookbuilding procedure for 1,000,000 simple debentures worth R$1 billion on October 2, 2024.
news.summary: Aura Minerals Inc. (TSX: ORA) (B3: AURA33) (OTCQX: ORAAF) announced on Oct. 15, 2024, from Road Town, British Virgin Islands, that its Subsidiary, Aura Almas Mineração S.A. (“Almas”), has completed the Bookbuilding Procedure for a public offering of 1,000,000 simple debentures. These debentures, issued on October 2, 2024, with a unit face value of R$1,000.00, total R$1,000,000,000.00. The debentures are not convertible into shares and are of the secured type, with an additional personal guarantee, in a single series.

CardioSight appoints Steve Motes as new CEO in Budapest on Oct. 15, 2024. Enhancing intra-cardiac visualization.
news.summary: In Budapest, Hungary, on October 15, 2024, CardioSight, Inc. made a significant announcement regarding their cutting-edge intra-cardiac visualization and interventional platform. The company has appointed Steve Motes as their new Chief Executive Officer, a position he officially assumed on the same day. With this new role, Steve is set to bring over a decade of experience to CardioSight, leveraging his expertise in the field to drive innovation and growth.

news.headline: BOJ: Monetary policy guided by sustainable inflation around 2%, allowing policy rate to move in line with neutral rate
UL Solutions warns of unauthorized UL Mark on LED bathroom mirrors; model MA6804 (834-027) affected, safety compliance unknown.
news.summary: A statement from UL Solutions in Northbrook, Illinois, reveals that LED illuminated bathroom mirrors bearing an unauthorized UL Certification Mark for the US and Canada has been identified. The specific product in question is the Model MA6804 (834-027) LED illuminated bathroom mirror. This product has not undergone evaluation by UL Solutions for compliance with Safety Standards, raising concerns about its safety. It is uncertain if these mirrors meet any safety requirements. UL Solutions recommends taking action regarding this issue.
